shop.help.gs.step1: 1. Craft a Shop Business License at a Carpentrybench (8 Oak Plank + 2 Iron Bar + 2 Gold Bar + 1 Leather).
shop.help.gs.step2: 2. Stand where you want your shop and right-click the license. An NPC will spawn at your position.
shop.help.gs.step3: 3. Open the editor with /ksshop edit, drag items into the shop grid, set prices on each slot, pick BUY/SELL/BOTH mode, then save.
shop.help.gs.step4: 4. Deposit coins to the shop (so it can buy from customers), then /ksshop open to accept visitors.
shop.help.gs.step5: 5. Place a Mailbox_Block and press F to claim earnings and any items bought from other shops.
shop.help.collect: /ksshop collect - Open your mailbox to claim earnings and bought items
shop.help.open: /ksshop open - Open your shop for business
